Historical territories are independent transparent polygons; modern state/UT borders stay behind as comparator lines. Database includes battles, treaties, legislation, marches, uprisings, cities and regional context.

Build note: this is now an expanded interactive database. It is broad, not infinite: “every event” in 1498–1947 is historically unbounded, but the file is structured so new entries can be added in one data array.
